creator: tijl@FreeBSD.org
text: Pages like https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/attachment.cgi?id=157119&action=edit don't display the patch in the iframe for me in Firefox.  Firefox complains about unencrypted elements on the page and blocks them.  Disabling the block makes the patch appear but leaves a warning icon in the address bar.  Perhaps the problem is that the attachment comes from a different domain (bz-attachments.freebsd.org)?
